title: Dirt Wake Word — precomputed openwakeword features
description: Precomputed openwakeword feature .npy files re-hosted from huggingface.co/datasets/davidscripka/openwakeword_features: ACAV100M 2000-hour training features (~2.8 GB) + 11-hour validation set features. Upload once, reuse every training run. Re-pull upstream if david's feature schema changes.
